title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.50 — LENS LEGIBILITY (user: left-aligned looks good BUT the lens shading makes text hard to read). KEPT left alignment; fixed the LIGHT: the lit-lens lamp hotspot sat at 36-48% across the cap so the left text zone fell in the dim ramp — lamp now biased left (28-38%), thrown wider (radius w*1.05 -> w*1.30), bright core stretched (gradient stop 0.22 -> 0.28). Labels switched to DejaVu BOLD (silkBold) at tile sizes; selector-tile text gained the missing 12px inset (left-justified labels were starting ON the cap edge shadow); IRON tile aligned to match. Live-layer only — no plate rebake. VERIFY: labels/values readable on every tile at a glance, lamp still reads aged/off-centre (not clinical). OPEN: further polish; LIMITER rename.
